summary: Add authentication gate to the Superstars app requiring login and permission checks.
implementation:
1. apps/web/lib/app-registry.ts: Change superstars entry from `auth: false` to `auth: true` (line 71).
2. apps/web/app/apps/superstars/layout.tsx: Make the default export async. Add `import { requireAppLayoutAccess } from "@/lib/require-app-layout-access";` and call `await requireAppLayoutAccess("superstars");` as the first line of the function body.
3. apps/web/app/apps/superstars/__tests__/layout.test.tsx: Create test file following the soccer-training pattern — mock `@/lib/require-app-layout-access`, then test four cases: (a) calls requireAppLayoutAccess with "superstars", (b) unauthenticated redirects to /login, (c) unauthorized redirects to /unauthorized, (d) renders children for authenticated user with permission.

testing.reason: Auth gating changes runtime behavior — unauthenticated/unauthorized users are now redirected. Smoke tests confirm the layout calls requireAppLayoutAccess correctly and propagates redirect errors.

verification.reason: Auth gate is server-side redirect logic tested via unit tests. No UI changes to verify in a browser — the layout markup is unchanged, only the access check is added.
